🚀 Launch SMART on FHIR Application

Select a FHIR server to demonstrate CMS Patient Access API

ℹ️ How it works: Select a configured FHIR server below, then click "Launch Application" to start the SMART authorization flow. You'll authenticate as a test patient and access their health data.
📡 Select FHIR Server

✓ Ready to Launch

⚠️ Configuration Required
This server needs to be configured before use. Please add your Client ID in config.js and ensure the redirect URI is registered with the FHIR server provider.
